commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=ad379a6c44667c568190cfdb51d2f9536431bffb)
commands.review_summary:
The PR exports and updates `extractTranscriptUserText` to strip simple media markers, adds unit tests for that helper, and skips workspace-relative joining for `media://` URLs in `loadWebMediaInternal`.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +49. Total +55 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: WebChat image uploads can persist transcript media notes, and `image-tool.ts` can rewrite `media://inbound/...` under `workspaceDir` before `loadWebMedia` runs. I did not execute a live WebChat flow in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: The PR needs contributor-supplied real behavior proof plus targeted code/test changes; ClawSweeper should not take a repair lane while the external proof gate is still missing.

target.title: fix: WebChat image uploads disappear (issue #86315)
target.body:
This PR resolves #86315. It fixes two bugs in the WebChat image handling:

1. In `src/gateway/server-methods/chat.ts`, `extractTranscriptUserText` now correctly handles content arrays (by concatenating text blocks) and strips media attachment markers. This ensures `rewriteChatSendUserTurnMediaPaths` can match user messages that include media attachments, so media paths are correctly recorded in the transcript.

2. In `src/media/web-media.ts`, `loadWebMediaInternal` now skips the `workspaceDir` relative-path join for any `media://` URI, preventing corruption of inbound media references.

Unit tests added for `extractTranscriptUserText` to prevent regressions.

These changes directly address the issue where uploaded images disappear from the Control UI history and media references fail in the image tool.
target.author: zhangguiping-xydt

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
